hero.description: Ancient Nordic rituals — birch sauna, cold plunge, 'Friluftsliv' forest bathing and Swedish steam therapy. Where the frozen cold and sauna warmth heal together.

rituals.label: Nordic Rituals
rituals.title: Three healing
rituals.description: 'Lagom' — just right, not too much, not too little. The Nordic philosophy of balance, reflected in three complete hot-cold-forest rituals.

services.label: Service menu
services.title: Authentic
services.description: Ingredients from Scandinavian forests: birch, pine, cedar, oak bark and Baltic sea salt.
services.subtitle: Experience authentic Nordic wellness rituals

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Discover the Nordic Spa story
about.storyTitle: Where Nordic Traditions Meet Modern Wellness
about.storyDesc1: Founded in 2020, Nordic Spa brings authentic Scandinavian wellness traditions to Vietnam. Our signature rituals combine the healing power of heat, cold, and nature — inspired by Finnish sauna culture, Norwegian 'Friluftsliv', and Swedish massage techniques.
about.storyDesc2: Every detail is carefully crafted to transport you to the serene forests of Scandinavia, from our birch-wood sauna rooms to our natural cold plunge pools.
about.value1Desc: Traditional Finnish sauna heated to 80°C for deep detoxification and relaxation.
about.value2Desc: Cold plunge therapy at 4°C for immune boost and circulation.
about.value3Desc: Forest bathing and nature connection for mental clarity.

policy.title: Policies
policy.subtitle: Terms, privacy and refund policies
policy.termsContent: By using Nordic Spa services, you agree to our terms of service. All services are subject to availability and may require advance booking.
policy.privacyContent: We protect your personal information and never share it with third parties without consent. Your data is stored securely following international standards.
policy.refundContent: Cancellations made 24 hours before appointment receive full refund. Late cancellations may incur a 50% fee. No-shows are charged full amount.
